title: ⚙️ Layout Configuration
description: Layout configuration presets with responsive breakpoints, spacing, and grid settings

layout.name: Breakpoints
layout.description: Responsive layout and spacing per breakpoint. Each value is a space-separated string of layout pattern + spacing tokens, e.g. "columns(3) pi(2) pbs(1) cg(2)"

internalName.title: Internal Name
internalName.description: Internal name for CMS editors — not displayed on the front end

name.title: Config Name
name.description: Config name ("Hero Full Width", "Card Grid Narrow")

columns.title: Grid Columns
columns.description: Default CSS grid-template-columns value (default: "1fr"). Overridden by breakpoint layout patterns.

col_gap.title: Column Gap
col_gap.description: Default column gap multiplier (0-4). Overridden by cg() token in breakpoints.

row_gap.title: Row Gap
row_gap.description: Default row gap multiplier (0-4). Overridden by rg() token in breakpoints.

overflow.title: Overflow
overflow.description: Overflow behavior: none, preview, preview-xs, preview-sm, preview-lg, preview-xl, fade, fade-start, fade-end

xs.title: Extra Small (240px+)
xs.description: Layout pattern + spacing tokens for extra small screens, e.g. "columns(1) pi(1) pbs(1)"

sm.title: Small (380px+)
sm.description: Layout pattern + spacing tokens for small screens, e.g. "columns(1) pi(1) pbs(1)"

md.title: Medium (540px+)
md.description: Layout pattern + spacing tokens for medium screens, e.g. "columns(2) pi(2) pbs(1) cg(2)"

lg.title: Large (720px+)
lg.description: Layout pattern + spacing tokens for large screens, e.g. "columns(3) pi(2) pbs(2) cg(2)"

xl.title: Extra Large (920px+)
xl.description: Layout pattern + spacing tokens for extra large screens, e.g. "columns(4) pi(4) pbs(2) cg(2)"

xxl.title: 2X Large (1140px+)
xxl.description: Layout pattern + spacing tokens for 2K+ screens
